scoring.formula: severity * max peak RPS * business criticality factor

risks.evidence: src/modules/checkout/checkout.service.js:2-5 awaits stripe.paymentIntents.create in the request path.
src/modules/products/products.service.js:4-7 SELECT has no LIMIT/OFFSET; products.controller.js:2 returns the whole rows array and pagination:null.
supportingCauses: Payload Size: every selected product row is serialized into one response.

risks.evidence: src/modules/products/products.service.js:9-13 reads PostgreSQL directly for every detail request while src/lib/redis.js supplies Redis.
src/modules/orders/orders.service.js:15-16 runs an INSERT and UPDATE inside the item loop; the route schema bounds the loop to 50 items.
src/modules/reviews/reviews.service.js:3-5 has no LIMIT/OFFSET and reviews.controller.js:2 returns all rows with pagination:null.
supportingCauses: Payload Size: free-form title and body fields are returned without a count or byte bound.

risks.evidence: src/modules/orders/orders.service.js:2-6 retrieves unbounded order history, then executes one item query per order.
supportingCauses: Missing Pagination on the authenticated order-history collection.
Payload Size: each order and every nested item is serialized in the same response.

fixedHistoricalRisks.evidence: src/modules/cart/cart.service.js:3 is authenticated-user scoped and inventory bounded; the former broad cart listing is absent.

dataSourceFailures.source: Google Analytics 4 live integration/current Chrome automation
dataSourceFailures.fallback: Repository estimates for DELETE /api/cart/items/:id plus a conservative health-check estimate.

dataSourceFailures.reason: The checked-in Datadog seed contains P95 but not P99; no numeric P99 was fabricated.

Exact Platform_Engineering_Team resolution, normalized-name resolution, full joined-team listing, and Performance_Test_Track message search returned no writable target. No message was sent to an unrelated team or channel.

teamsNotification.sendReadyMessage:
API performance audit — 02 Jul 2026 (00:00–23:59 Asia/Kolkata, UTC+05:30)
Repository: mukeshempiricinfotech-star/api_load_testing
APIs discovered: 15 (14 business routes + /health)
User journeys: 4 — Auth lifecycle; Browse/Discovery; Cart Management; Purchase/Checkout
Generated scripts: 4 k6 journey scripts + shared runtime; 4 Locust journey scripts + shared runtime. Each supports Smoke, Load, Stress, Spike, Soak, and Breakpoint profiles.
Coverage: 100% current vs 61% previous (+39 percentage points)
Current risks: 6. High: synchronous Stripe capture at POST /api/checkout/payment (APIPERF-4); unbounded GET /api/products pagination/payload (APIPERF-5). Improvement task: uncached GET /api/products/:id (APIPERF-3). Existing review-pagination ticket retained: APIPERF-1. Historical cart ticket APIPERF-2 remains Done.
Most common root causes: Missing Pagination/Payload Size and Database Query Inefficiency; additional high-impact causes are Synchronous External Call and Missing Caching.
Report: https://docs.google.com/document/d/1YtoiGfQcVTCWpOep4suhpVGL0zXe_QXpDOHoBDT43nk
Notes: Traffic uses the checked-in 25 Jun–1 Jul Datadog seed because live Datadog/GA4/Chrome fallback was unavailable. DELETE /api/cart/items/:id and /health are explicitly Estimated Traffic; P99 and GA4 geo/device/peak-hour data were unavailable and were not guessed. Commit: https://github.com/mukeshempiricinfotech-star/api_load_testing/commit/fe160806716cdd110d5dc0307bf89d0cf215329e
